name: M4A1消音版 | 多变迷彩
collection: 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: With a smaller magazine than its unmuffled counterpart, the silenced M4A1 provides quieter shots with less recoil and better accuracy. It has been painted using a VariCamo patterned hydrographic. Rebuilding only comes in the wake of destruction
descriptionZh: 消音版 M4A1 相对于它那没有消音器的同行来说弹匣更小，枪声也较为“沉默”，还拥有更小的后坐力和更高的精准度。 这把武器使用多变迷彩图案花纹进行了涂装。 没有毁灭，哪来重生
